result.stderr:
Usage of /tmp/inspectra-help-sop4cs-44ce67a8-f4668821/home/.sop/bin/sop-httpserver:
  -config string
    	Path to configuration file (optional)
  -database string
    	Path to the SOP database/data directory (default "/tmp/sop_data")
  -enable-rest-auth
    	Enable Bearer token authentication for REST endpoints
  -mode string
    	SOP mode: 'standalone' or 'clustered' (default "standalone")
  -open-browser
    	Open browser on startup (default true)
  -pageSize int
    	Number of items to display per page (default 40)
  -port int
    	Port to run the server on (default 8080)
  -redis string
    	Redis URL for clustered mode (e.g. localhost:6379) (default "localhost:6379")
  -stub
    	Enable stub mode for AI agents
  -version
    	Show version and exit
